title: hupodeiknumi #5263
definition:
1) to show by placing under (i.e. before) the eyes
 2) to show by words and arguments, i.e. to teach
 3) to show by make known future things
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to show by placing under (i.e. before) the eyes
 2) to show by words and arguments, i.e. to teach
 3) to show by make known future things

    NASB:  to show secretly, to show by tracing out, to teach, make known:
